---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% rename(y = body_mass, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island, f2 = sex)
test_data$y_bin = as.integer(test_data$f2) - 1
levels(test_data$f1) |> print()
levels(test_data$f2) |> print()
nrow(test_data) |> print()
```

```{r}
test_data[10:20,]
```

```{r}
fit = breg(y ~ x1, 
           data = test_data |> dplyr::filter(f1 == "Torgersen"))
```

```{r}
fit = brms::stancode(f2 ~ x1,
                     data = test_data,
                     family = brms::bernoulli())
fit
```

```{r}
gfit = glm(f2 ~ 1, data = test_data, family = binomial())
summary(gfit)
```
